records.Definition: Total number of active employees at a point in time.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: COUNT of active employees as of reporting date.

records.Definition: Active employees grouped by department or business unit.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: COUNT of active employees by department.

records.Definition: Active employees grouped by office, region, country, or work location.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: COUNT of active employees by location.
records.Purpose / Insight: Supports local workforce planning and compliance.

records.Definition: Active employees grouped by job role or job family.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: COUNT of active employees by role or job family.
records.Purpose / Insight: Shows capability mix across the organization.

records.Definition: Active employees grouped by job level, grade, or seniority band.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: COUNT of active employees by level.
records.Purpose / Insight: Shows organizational shape and seniority mix.

records.Definition: Full-time equivalent workforce size after adjusting part-time schedules.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: SUM of employee FTE values.
records.Purpose / Insight: Gives a cleaner capacity measure than raw headcount.

records.Definition: Share of employees by full-time, part-time, temporary, intern, contractor, or contingent type.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: COUNT by worker type / total workforce.
records.Purpose / Insight: Shows workforce model and dependency on non-permanent labor.

records.Definition: Total joins, exits, promotions, transfers, and other movements in a period.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: COUNT of employee movement events by type.
records.Purpose / Insight: Shows how the workforce is changing.

records.Definition: Net increase or decrease in headcount over a period.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: New hires minus exits, or ending headcount minus starting headcount.

records.Definition: Percentage change in headcount over a period.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Ending headcount minus starting headcount divided by starting headcount.
records.Purpose / Insight: Shows pace of workforce expansion or reduction.

records.Definition: Average number of direct reports per manager.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Direct reports / people managers.
records.Purpose / Insight: Highlights manager load and organization design health.

records.Definition: Number of reporting layers between CEO or top leader and employees.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: COUNT of hierarchy levels in org structure.

records.Definition: Share of workforce classified as people managers.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: People managers / total employees.
records.Purpose / Insight: Shows leadership density and operating leverage.

records.Definition: Share of workforce classified as non-managers.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Individual contributors / total employees.
records.Purpose / Insight: Shows balance between execution roles and management roles.

records.Definition: Share of approved positions that are unfilled.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Open positions / approved positions.
records.Purpose / Insight: Shows capacity gap against the workforce plan.

records.Definition: Share of critical roles that are filled or have coverage.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Filled critical roles / total critical roles.
records.Purpose / Insight: Shows exposure in roles essential to business continuity.

records.Definition: Total salary, wages, bonus, benefits, payroll taxes, and related employment cost.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: SUM of labor cost components.

records.Definition: Average people cost per active employee.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Total labor cost / average headcount.

records.Definition: Revenue generated per average employee.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Total revenue / average headcount or average FTE.
records.Purpose / Insight: Measures workforce productivity at company level.

records.Definition: Operating profit or EBITDA per average employee.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Profit measure / average headcount or FTE.
records.Purpose / Insight: Connects workforce scale to business outcomes.

records.Definition: Number of positions approved in the workforce plan.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: COUNT of planned positions by period and team.
records.Purpose / Insight: Sets the baseline for hiring and budget control.

records.Definition: Difference between planned and actual active headcount.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Actual headcount minus planned headcount.
records.Purpose / Insight: Shows whether teams are above or below plan.

records.Definition: Number of hires planned for a future period.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: COUNT of planned hire positions by period.

records.Definition: Expected employee exits based on known resignations, contract ends, or forecast model.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: COUNT of expected exits or predicted exit volume.

records.Definition: Difference between forecasted workforce demand and available workforce supply.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Required FTE minus forecasted available FTE.
records.Purpose / Insight: Highlights future hiring or redeployment needs.

records.Definition: Difference between planned and actual people cost.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Actual labor cost minus budgeted labor cost.

records.Definition: Number of days approved positions remain unfilled.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Current date minus position approval date for unfilled positions.

records.Definition: Expected headcount under different growth, hiring freeze, or restructuring scenarios.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Scenario assumptions applied to starting headcount and movements.

records.Definition: Count of approved requisitions currently open for hiring.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: COUNT of requisitions with open status.

records.Definition: Number of days a requisition has been open.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Today minus requisition open date.
records.Purpose / Insight: Flags roles at risk of delay.

records.Definition: Open requisitions grouped by hiring priority.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: COUNT of open requisitions by priority.

records.Definition: Whether a requisition backfills an employee or adds a new position.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: COUNT or share by replacement/new category.
records.Purpose / Insight: Separates continuity hiring from growth hiring.

records.Definition: Number of candidates who applied in a period.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: COUNT of applications.

records.Definition: Candidates meeting minimum role requirements after screening.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: COUNT of candidates marked qualified or advanced past screen.
records.Purpose / Insight: Separates raw volume from usable pipeline.

records.Definition: Active candidates grouped by recruiting stage.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: COUNT of candidates by current stage.

records.Definition: Candidates grouped by application or sourcing source.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: COUNT of candidates by source.

records.Definition: Available qualified candidates relative to hiring need.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Qualified active candidates / open requisitions or target pipeline size.
records.Purpose / Insight: Shows whether roles have enough viable pipeline.

records.Definition: Share of applicants moved to initial screen.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Screened candidates / applicants.
records.Purpose / Insight: Measures application quality and review selectivity.

records.Definition: Share of screened candidates moved to interview.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Interviewed candidates / screened candidates.

records.Definition: Share of interviewed candidates receiving offers.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Offers made / interviewed candidates.

records.Definition: Share of offers accepted by candidates.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Accepted offers / offers made.

records.Definition: Share of applicants who become hires.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Hires / applicants.

records.Definition: Share of candidates who exit at each stage.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Candidates dropped or withdrawn in stage / candidates entering stage.

records.Definition: Days from requisition opening to accepted offer or filled date.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Accepted offer date minus requisition open date.

records.Definition: Days from candidate application or sourcing to accepted offer.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Accepted offer date minus candidate entry date.

records.Definition: Average or median days candidates spend in each recruiting stage.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Stage exit date minus stage entry date.

records.Definition: Time from application to first recruiter response.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: First response timestamp minus application timestamp.

records.Definition: Days from final interview to offer extension.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Offer date minus final interview date.

records.Definition: Source credited for hired candidates.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: COUNT of hires by source.

records.Definition: Share of candidates from each source who become hires or advance.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Hires or advances from source / candidates from source.

records.Definition: Post-hire outcomes grouped by source.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Average quality score, retention, or performance by source.
records.Purpose / Insight: Shows which channels produce strong hires.

records.Definition: Number or share of hires from employee referrals.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Referral hires / total hires.

records.Definition: Share of hires or candidates supplied by agencies.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Agency hires or candidates / total hires or candidates.

records.Definition: Average recruiting cost to produce one hire.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Total recruiting cost / hires.

records.Definition: Average cost to generate one qualified candidate.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Source or campaign cost / qualified candidates.
records.Purpose / Insight: Compares source efficiency after quality adjustment.

records.Definition: Total recruiting agency fees incurred.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: SUM of agency invoices or placement fees.

records.Definition: Categorized reasons candidates decline offers.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: COUNT or share of declined offers by reason.

records.Definition: Difference between offered compensation and approved range or budget.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Offer amount minus budget midpoint or maximum.

records.Definition: Time from offer request to final approval.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Offer approval timestamp minus request timestamp.

records.Definition: Share of accepted offers that do not start.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Accepted offers not started / accepted offers.

records.Definition: Average candidate rating of the hiring process.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Average candidate survey score.

records.Definition: Candidate net promoter score for the hiring experience.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Percent promoters minus percent detractors.
records.Purpose / Insight: Shows employer brand impact of recruitment.

records.Definition: Share of candidates who voluntarily leave the process.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Withdrawn candidates / candidates in process.
records.Purpose / Insight: Flags process or offer attractiveness issues.

records.Definition: Share of scheduled interviews not attended by candidates.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Candidate no-shows / scheduled interviews.
records.Purpose / Insight: Shows candidate commitment and scheduling quality.

records.Definition: Time hiring managers take to respond to submissions or decisions.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Manager response timestamp minus recruiter request timestamp.

records.Definition: Share of completed interviews with submitted feedback.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Feedback submitted / completed interviews.

records.Definition: Time between interview completion and feedback submission.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Feedback timestamp minus interview end timestamp.

records.Definition: Measure of consistency against interview rubric or panel consensus.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Rubric completion, variance from panel, or calibration review score.

records.Definition: Active requisition workload assigned to each recruiter.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Open requisitions / recruiter.

records.Definition: Number of hires completed by recruiter in a period.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: COUNT of hires by recruiter.
records.Purpose / Insight: Measures recruiter output with role complexity context.

records.Definition: Share of sourced candidates who respond to outreach.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Candidate responses / outreach messages sent.

records.Definition: Share of new hires who complete required onboarding tasks.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Completed onboarding tasks or hires / required tasks or hires.

records.Definition: Share of hires completing tasks before start date.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Pre-start completed tasks / required pre-start tasks.

records.Definition: Share of new hires with equipment, access, documents, and schedule ready on day one.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: New hires fully ready on day one / new hires starting.

records.Definition: Share of required employment documents completed by new hires.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Completed documents / required documents.

records.Definition: Average new hire rating of onboarding experience.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Average onboarding survey score.
records.Purpose / Insight: Shows onboarding quality from the employee view.

records.Definition: Average survey score from new hires around day 30.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Average 30-day new hire survey score.

records.Definition: Average survey score from new hires around day 60.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Average 60-day new hire survey score.
records.Purpose / Insight: Tracks adjustment and support after initial ramp.

records.Definition: Average survey score from new hires around day 90.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Average 90-day new hire survey score.
records.Purpose / Insight: Shows whether new hires are settling in.

records.Definition: Time required for a new hire to reach expected productivity.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Date productivity threshold reached minus start date.

records.Definition: Share of expected ramp milestones completed by target dates.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Completed ramp milestones / planned ramp milestones.

records.Definition: Share of required manager check-ins completed for new hires.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Completed check-ins / required check-ins.

records.Definition: Share of new hires assigned a buddy or onboarding partner.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: New hires with buddy assigned / new hires.

records.Definition: Share of new hires leaving within first 90 days.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: New hires exited within 90 days / eligible new hires.
records.Purpose / Insight: Flags hiring or onboarding fit issues.

records.Definition: Share of new hires leaving within first 12 months.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: New hires exited within 12 months / eligible new hires.
records.Purpose / Insight: Critical measure of hire and onboarding quality.

records.Definition: Share of new hires who pass probation.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: New hires passing probation / new hires completing probation review.

records.Definition: Share of average workforce that exited in a period.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Total exits / average headcount.

records.Definition: Share of average workforce that resigned voluntarily.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Voluntary exits / average headcount.

records.Definition: Share of average workforce exited by company decision.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Involuntary exits / average headcount.

records.Definition: Share of valued employees who leave voluntarily.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Regrettable voluntary exits / average headcount or regrettable population.
records.Purpose / Insight: Highlights avoidable loss of important talent.

records.Definition: Share of exits considered acceptable or non-regrettable.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Functional exits / average headcount.
records.Purpose / Insight: Distinguishes healthy churn from harmful attrition.

records.Definition: Turnover rate grouped by department.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Exits by department / average department headcount.

records.Definition: Turnover rate grouped by manager.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Exits from manager team / average team headcount.

records.Definition: Turnover rate grouped by tenure range.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Exits by tenure band / average headcount in tenure band.
records.Purpose / Insight: Shows when employees are most likely to leave.

records.Definition: Share of high performers leaving voluntarily.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: High performer voluntary exits / high performer population.

records.Definition: Share of employees retained over a period.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Employees retained through period / employees at start of period.

records.Definition: Share of new hires retained after a milestone.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: New hires still active at 3, 6, or 12 months / eligible new hires.
records.Purpose / Insight: Shows quality of hiring and onboarding.

records.Definition: Average length of service for active employees.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Average of current date minus employee start date.

records.Definition: Middle value of employee tenure distribution.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Median of current date minus start date.
records.Purpose / Insight: Reduces distortion from very long-tenured employees.

records.Definition: Share of promoted employees retained after promotion.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Promoted employees still active after milestone / promoted employees eligible.
records.Purpose / Insight: Shows whether promotion decisions improve retention.

records.Definition: Employee exit reasons grouped by category.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: COUNT of exits by reason category.

records.Definition: Share of exiting employees who complete exit survey.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Completed exit surveys / eligible exits.

records.Definition: Average sentiment or satisfaction score from exit feedback.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Average exit survey rating or sentiment score.

records.Definition: Predicted likelihood an employee may leave.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Model score based on selected predictors and governance controls.

records.Definition: Retention rate for employees in critical roles or critical talent pools.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Critical talent retained / critical talent population.
records.Purpose / Insight: Shows continuity risk for key capabilities.

records.Definition: Overall employee engagement survey score.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Average engagement items or index score.

records.Definition: Employee net promoter score based on likelihood to recommend company as a workplace.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Percent promoters minus percent detractors.

records.Definition: Share of eligible employees who complete the survey.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Survey responses / eligible employees.

records.Definition: Engagement score grouped by department.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Average engagement score by department.

records.Definition: Engagement score grouped by manager team.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Average engagement score by manager team.

records.Definition: Employee perception of belonging and inclusion.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Average belonging survey items.

records.Definition: Survey score for manager behaviors and support.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Average manager effectiveness survey items.

records.Definition: Number of recognition moments or awards per employee.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Recognition events / average headcount.

records.Definition: Survey or model indicator of exhaustion and unsustainable workload.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Average burnout items or risk model score.

records.Definition: Employee rating of workload manageability.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Average workload survey item score.

records.Definition: Employee rating of safety to speak up or take interpersonal risks.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Average psychological safety survey items.

records.Definition: Satisfaction by lifecycle moment such as onboarding, development, promotion, or exit.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Average experience score by lifecycle event.
records.Purpose / Insight: Shows which employee journeys need improvement.

records.Definition: Distribution of performance ratings across employees.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: COUNT or share of employees by performance rating.

records.Definition: Share of employees rated as high performers.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: High performers / rated employees.

records.Definition: Share of employees rated below expectations.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Low performers / rated employees.
records.Purpose / Insight: Shows performance support or management needs.

records.Definition: Share of required performance reviews completed.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Completed reviews / required reviews.

records.Definition: Share of goals completed or achieved.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Completed or achieved goals / total goals.

records.Definition: Share of employee goals aligned to team or company goals.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Aligned goals / total goals.
records.Purpose / Insight: Shows connection between individual work and strategy.

records.Definition: Performance outcomes grouped by tenure band.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Average or distribution of ratings by tenure band.
records.Purpose / Insight: Shows ramp and career-stage performance patterns.

records.Definition: Performance outcomes grouped by manager team.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Rating distribution by manager team.
records.Purpose / Insight: Supports calibration review and manager coaching.

records.Definition: Revenue generated per full-time equivalent employee.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Revenue / average FTE.

records.Definition: Business output per employee for a defined function.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Function output units / average headcount.
records.Purpose / Insight: Measures productivity where output is measurable.

records.Definition: Productivity measure adjusted for lost work time.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Output / available work hours after absence.

records.Definition: Share of assigned training completed.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Completed assigned training / assigned training.

records.Definition: Share of required compliance or mandatory training completed.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Completed mandatory training / assigned mandatory training.

records.Definition: Average learning hours completed per employee.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Total completed learning hours / average headcount.

records.Definition: Employees participating in at least one learning activity.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: COUNT of employees with learning activity in period.

records.Definition: Average learner satisfaction rating.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Average post-training survey score.

records.Definition: Measure of knowledge gain or behavior change after training.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Post-training assessment or manager score compared with baseline.

records.Definition: Share of learners passing required assessments.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Learners passing / learners assessed.

records.Definition: Share of required skills covered by current employees.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Employees with required skill / employees or roles requiring skill.

records.Definition: Number of required skills missing or under-covered.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: COUNT of required skills below coverage threshold.

records.Definition: Share of employees completing required certifications.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Employees certified / employees required to certify.
records.Purpose / Insight: Shows readiness for regulated or technical work.

records.Definition: Share of employees completing agreed development actions.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Completed development actions / planned actions.

records.Definition: Average L&D cost per employee.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Total L&D spend / average headcount.

records.Definition: Estimated benefit of training relative to cost.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Training benefit minus cost divided by cost.

records.Definition: Share of employees moving internally through transfer or role change.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Internal moves / average headcount.

records.Definition: Share of open roles filled by internal candidates.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Internal hires / total filled roles.
records.Purpose / Insight: Measures use of internal talent marketplace.

records.Definition: Share of employees making lateral internal moves.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Lateral moves / average headcount.

records.Definition: Share of employees promoted in a period.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Promotions / average headcount.

records.Definition: Promotion rate compared across demographic groups where appropriate.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Promotions by group / eligible population by group.

records.Definition: Average time from hire or last promotion to next promotion.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Promotion date minus hire or prior promotion date.

records.Definition: Share of critical roles with at least one identified successor.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Critical roles with successor / total critical roles.

records.Definition: Share of critical roles with a ready-now successor.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Critical roles with ready-now successor / total critical roles.

records.Definition: Number of viable successors per critical role.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Successor count / critical roles.
records.Purpose / Insight: Measures depth of internal talent pipeline.

records.Definition: Share of succession plans reviewed within target period.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Recently reviewed plans / total succession plans.

records.Definition: Average base salary for a population.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: SUM of base salary / employee count.

records.Definition: Middle value of base salary distribution.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Median of base salary values.

records.Definition: Employee salary as a percentage of salary range midpoint.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Employee salary / salary range midpoint.
records.Purpose / Insight: Shows pay position against internal ranges.

records.Definition: Employee salary position within assigned pay range.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Salary minus range minimum divided by range maximum minus range minimum.

records.Definition: Adjusted or unadjusted pay difference between groups.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Pay comparison by group using approved methodology.

records.Definition: Employee or role pay compared with market benchmark.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Company pay / market benchmark pay.

records.Definition: Average salary increase as a percentage of prior salary.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Salary increase amount / prior salary.

records.Definition: Actual bonus payout relative to target bonus.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Actual bonus / target bonus.

records.Definition: Total cost of overtime pay in a period.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: SUM of overtime pay.
records.Purpose / Insight: Shows workload and labor cost pressure.

records.Data Point: Payroll cost as percent of revenue
records.Definition: Payroll cost relative to revenue.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Payroll cost / revenue.
records.Purpose / Insight: Connects payroll spend to business scale.

records.Definition: Share of eligible employees using a benefit.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Employees using benefit / eligible employees.

records.Definition: Average benefits cost per employee.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Total benefits cost / average headcount.

records.Definition: Share of eligible employees enrolled in health benefits.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Enrolled employees / eligible employees.

records.Definition: Share of eligible employees participating in retirement plan.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Participating employees / eligible employees.

records.Definition: Use of parental, caregiver, sabbatical, or other leave benefits.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Employees using benefit or leave days used / eligible population.
records.Purpose / Insight: Shows value and access to leave benefits.

records.Definition: Share of payroll transactions without error.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Accurate payroll transactions / total payroll transactions.

records.Definition: Share of payroll records requiring correction.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Payroll corrections / payroll records.

records.Definition: Share of payroll completed on regular cycle without off-cycle payment.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: On-cycle payments / total payments.

records.Definition: Employee representation by demographic group where legally appropriate.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: COUNT or share of employees by demographic group.

records.Definition: Representation by demographic group in management or leadership roles.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Leaders by group / total leaders.

records.Definition: Representation by demographic group across levels.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Employees by group and level / total employees at level.

records.Definition: Representation by demographic group across departments.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Employees by group and department / department headcount.

records.Definition: Representation of applicants by demographic group where appropriate.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Applicants by group / total applicants.

records.Definition: Representation of candidates who reach interview stage.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Interviewed candidates by group / total interviewed.

records.Definition: Representation of candidates receiving offers.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Offers by group / total offers.

records.Definition: Representation of new hires by demographic group.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Hires by group / total hires.

records.Definition: Conversion rates across hiring stages by demographic group where appropriate.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Stage advances by group / stage entrants by group.

records.Definition: Comparison of promotion rates by demographic group where appropriate.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Promotion rate by group compared with eligible population.

records.Definition: Turnover rates by demographic group where appropriate.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Exits by group / average headcount by group.

records.Definition: Pay comparison across demographic groups using approved methodology.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Adjusted or unadjusted pay gap by group.

records.Definition: Survey measure of inclusive culture.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Average inclusion survey items.

records.Definition: Belonging survey score compared across demographic groups.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Average belonging score by group.

records.Definition: Share of employees participating in ERGs or affinity groups.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: ERG participants / eligible employee population.

records.Definition: Share of employees who have provided demographic self-identification where voluntary and lawful.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Employees with self-ID data / eligible employees.

records.Definition: Engagement score grouped by manager team.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Average team engagement score by manager.

records.Definition: Turnover rate grouped by manager team.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Team exits / average team headcount.

records.Definition: Absence rate grouped by manager team.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Team absence days / available workdays.
records.Purpose / Insight: Shows team wellbeing and attendance patterns.

records.Definition: Performance rating distribution by manager team.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: COUNT or share of ratings by manager team.

records.Definition: Share of expected manager one-on-ones completed.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Completed 1:1s / expected 1:1s.
records.Purpose / Insight: Shows manager follow-through on employee support.

records.Definition: Number of feedback moments delivered per employee.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Feedback events / employee count.

records.Definition: Share of managers completing required manager training.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Managers completed training / managers assigned training.

records.Definition: Employee survey score about manager support, clarity, and coaching.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Average manager effectiveness survey items.

records.Definition: Managers whose direct-report count exceeds or falls below target range.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: COUNT of managers outside target span.

records.Definition: Share of available work time lost to unplanned absence.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Unplanned absence days / available workdays.

records.Definition: Sick leave days relative to available workdays.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Sick leave days / available workdays.

records.Definition: Share of scheduled shifts or days with late arrival.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Late arrivals / scheduled work events.

records.Definition: Share of scheduled shifts missed without notice.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: No-show events / scheduled shifts.

records.Definition: Share of accrued paid time off used.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: PTO days used / PTO days accrued or available.
records.Purpose / Insight: Shows whether employees are taking rest.

records.Definition: Remaining leave days or hours not used.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: SUM of unused leave balances.
records.Purpose / Insight: Flags burnout risk and financial liability.

records.Definition: Financial value of accrued unused leave.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Unused leave hours multiplied by applicable pay rate.

records.Definition: Share of employees returning after parental leave.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Employees returning from parental leave / employees scheduled to return.

records.Definition: Total overtime hours worked in a period.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: SUM of overtime hours.

records.Definition: Average recorded work hours per employee per week.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Total work hours / employee weeks.

records.Definition: Survey or operational indicator of burnout risk.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Average burnout score or employees above risk threshold.
records.Purpose / Insight: Flags teams needing workload or support action.

records.Definition: Use of employee assistance program, reported only in aggregate.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: EAP users or sessions / eligible employees.
records.Purpose / Insight: Shows use of support resources without identifying individuals.

records.Definition: Recordable safety incidents per standard hours or headcount.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Incidents / hours worked times standard multiplier.

records.Definition: Injuries causing lost work time per standard hours.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Lost time injuries / hours worked times standard multiplier.

records.Definition: Number of ER cases opened in a period.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: COUNT of ER cases opened.
records.Purpose / Insight: Shows employee relations workload and climate.

records.Definition: ER cases relative to headcount.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: ER cases / average headcount.

records.Definition: Average time to close employee relations cases.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Case close date minus case open date.

records.Definition: Current active employee relations cases.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: COUNT of cases with open status.

records.Definition: Formal grievances relative to headcount.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Grievances / average headcount.

records.Definition: Disciplinary actions relative to headcount.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Disciplinary actions / average headcount.

records.Definition: Share of required compliance training completed.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Completed compliance training / assigned compliance training.

records.Definition: Share of employees acknowledging required policies.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Completed acknowledgements / required acknowledgements.

records.Definition: Share of employees with complete authorization documentation where applicable.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Employees with valid documentation / employees requiring documentation.

records.Definition: Share of required background checks completed.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Completed background checks / required checks.

records.Definition: Number of HR compliance audit findings.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: COUNT of findings by audit period and severity.

records.Definition: Time to complete employee data privacy requests.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Completion date minus request date.

records.Definition: Number of HR service requests opened.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: COUNT of HR tickets opened.

records.Definition: Average time to resolve HR service requests.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Ticket close timestamp minus open timestamp.

records.Definition: Share of HR cases resolved without escalation or reopening.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Cases resolved on first contact / total closed cases.

records.Definition: Share of HR cases resolved within service target.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Cases resolved within SLA / total closed cases.

records.Definition: Employee rating of HR service experience.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Average HR service survey score.

records.Definition: Share of HR requests completed through self-service channels.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Self-service transactions / total HR transactions.

records.Definition: Employee usage of HR knowledge articles.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Views or resolved searches in HR knowledge base.

records.Definition: Average HR operating cost per employee.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: HR operating cost / average headcount.

records.Definition: HR employees relative to total employees.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: HR FTE / total employee FTE or headcount.

records.Definition: Share of required employee data fields populated.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Completed required fields / total required fields.

records.Definition: Share of records with validation errors.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Records with errors / records checked.

records.Definition: Number of employee record changes in a period.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: COUNT of master data changes.
records.Purpose / Insight: Shows operational activity and possible control risk.

records.Definition: Share of HR transactions completed automatically.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Automated transactions / total eligible transactions.

records.Definition: Share of HR transactions requiring manual correction.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Manual corrections / total transactions.

records.Definition: Share of exiting employees with required offboarding tasks completed.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Completed offboarding tasks / required offboarding tasks.

records.Definition: Share of exits where system access is removed by target deadline.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: On-time access removals / required access removals.

records.Definition: Share of final payments completed accurately.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Accurate final payments / final payments issued.

records.Definition: Share of exiting employees completing exit interviews.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Completed exit interviews / eligible exits.

records.Definition: Share of required handover or knowledge transfer tasks completed before exit.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Completed handover tasks / required handover tasks.

records.Definition: Share of hires who are returning former employees.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Rehires / total hires.

records.Definition: Participation or activity level in alumni programs.
records.Recommended Formula / Calculation: Alumni event participants or active alumni / total alumni contacted.
